description: Update live MT5 trading bot to real-time: 1-second polling, tick-level monitoring, instant entry detection, and pre-computation of direction/weakness signals
steps: Update mt5_config.py: Set POLL_INTERVAL_SECONDS = 1, add tick monitoring settings (TICK_MONITORING_ENABLED, CANDLE_CLOSE_DETECTION_MS, PRE_COMPUTE_SIGNALS)
Update mt5_data_feed.py: Add get_latest_tick() method that wraps mt5.symbol_info_tick() for real-time tick monitoring and candle close detection

Create mt5_tick_monitor.py: New module with TickMonitor class that handles real-time tick stream processing, candle close detection, pre-computation of direction+weakness signals, and signal readiness state (ARMED/SCANNING/IDLE)

Update mt5_trader.py: Replace 60-second sleep loop with 1-second tick-monitoring loop, integrate TickMonitor for candle close detection, instant signal execution on new 1M candle, tick-level price monitoring for rectangle zone awareness
acceptance_criteria: mt5_config.py has tick monitoring configuration constants
mt5_tick_monitor.py exists with TickMonitor class implementing candle close detection and pre-computation
mt5_tick_monitor.py has SignalState enum with IDLE, SCANNING, ARMED states
mt5_trader.py uses 1-second loop with tick monitoring for instant candle close detection
mt5_trader.py has instant order execution (no delay between signal and order)
All Python files have valid syntax
verification: Run: python -c "import ast; [ast.parse(open(f'CCT_Rectangle_Bot/live_mt5/{f}').read()) for f in ['mt5_config.py','mt5_data_feed.py','mt5_tick_monitor.py','mt5_trader.py']]" to verify syntax
Run: ls CCT_Rectangle_Bot/live_mt5/mt5_tick_monitor.py to confirm new file exists
Run: grep 'POLL_INTERVAL_SECONDS = 1' CCT_Rectangle_Bot/live_mt5/mt5_config.py to verify setting
findings: All 4 modified/created files pass ast.parse syntax validation. MetaTrader5 package cannot be imported on Linux (Windows-only) so validation limited to syntax checking. POLL_INTERVAL_SECONDS=1 confirmed. TickMonitor class implements candle close detection via 1M bar timestamp comparison, pre-computation of direction (4H) and weakness (15M) signals with configurable cache durations, and SignalState enum (IDLE/SCANNING/ARMED). mt5_trader.py hot path uses cached dataframes and only fetches fresh 1M data on candle close for sub-500ms execution. Dashboard update call kept compatible with existing Dashboard.update() signature (no monitor_stats param passed).
